# @univerjs-pro/docs-exchange-client

[![npm version](https://img.shields.io/npm/v/@univerjs-pro/docs-exchange-client?style=flat-square)](https://npmjs.com/package/@univerjs-pro/docs-exchange-client)
[![downloads](https://img.shields.io/npm/dm/@univerjs-pro/docs-exchange-client?style=flat-square)](https://npmjs.com/package/@univerjs-pro/docs-exchange-client)

`@univerjs-pro/docs-exchange-client` provides document import and export client integration for Univer Pro.

## Package Overview

| Package | UMD global | CSS | Locales | Facade entry |
| --- | --- | :---: | :---: | :---: |
| `@univerjs-pro/docs-exchange-client` | `UniverProDocsExchangeClient` | No | No | No |

## Installation

```sh
pnpm add @univerjs-pro/docs-exchange-client
# or
npm install @univerjs-pro/docs-exchange-client
```

Keep all `@univerjs/*` and `@univerjs-pro/*` packages on the same version.

## Usage

```ts
import { UniverDocsExchangeClientPlugin } from '@univerjs-pro/docs-exchange-client';

univer.registerPlugin(UniverDocsExchangeClientPlugin);
```
